name: @vaipakam/ui
description: Shared React components for Vaipakam apps. Stage 2b scope: only the truly framework-decoupled primitives (InfoTip, TokenIcon). Most candidate components in apps/defi/src/components/ couple to defi-only hooks (WalletContext, useEnsName, useTokenMeta, coingecko hooks) or app-specific lib (format with i18n, contracts/config with Vite env). Each will migrate in a follow-up Stage 2c after its dependency chain is extracted.
